title: 日本ダービーの後に・開かれた窓

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Bright! That was a great race. You did awesome!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's right, Bright! You really went all out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a wide course like this, Mejiro Bright was able
to unleash her full potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess I had nothing to fear. There was no
unexpectedly powerful opponent...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, how was my performance? Did I start my
spurt at the right time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to rush forward at the perfect
moment for me, but... well...
choice_data_list: You seized the perfect moment, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. My, I don't have a single
care in the world right now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright was able to run exactly how she
wanted, unaffected by the incredible event that is
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Good day to you. I'm so glad we were able to
spend this lovely time together.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes... But that aside...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: While watching you today, I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You did? Oh dear, what would that be?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You've perfected your own way of running. That's
why you could smile out there. But...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can't. It's not because I lost. I couldn't even if I
won.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's about running the way my heart wants. You've
managed to do that, but I haven't.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have to pass you. I have to pass this
trial... and see the beautiful scenery I wanted to
today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If I can't do that, then I can't be my true self.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I finally made up my mind. So I wanted to... to
thank you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Let's race together again, Bright. I don't think it
will be at the Kikuka Sho, but someday, we'll race
again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Let's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer?
choice_data_list:
I guess Suzuka also learned something
important.

I guess Suzuka also learned something
important.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she realized something while watching
Mejiro Bright. The Derby means different things
to different people, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The Kikuka Sho is next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I usually like small flowers, but the Kikuka Sho
refers to a chrysanthemum, yes? Despite their
size, I love them too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Looking at them makes me feel bright and proud.
I just want to say, "Look at how lovely you are!"
choice_data_list:
Are you sure you don't want to run in a different
race?

Are you sure you don't want to run in a different
race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but ask. Rather than the long-distance
Kikuka Sho, some runners set their sights on
medium-distance races during their classic year in
the fall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: No. It has to be the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing to the Mejiro family is
winning races of prestige such as the Tenno Sho
and those in the Classic Triple Crown. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What I want is what the Mejiros want. That's all
there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's dream is unshakable. With our
goal set on the Kikuka Sho, it's time to start
training again.
